TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Lalood_no_Madawdaw, title = Lalood_no_Madawdaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lalood_no_Madawdaw} }

S.FORM: == Lalood no Madawdaw == Itiyaay i 1911 miheca a lalood no Sawali'an 'Amis a tamdaw ato tayhin no Dipon. itini i Posongay kowan no Dipong o sakakaay konini a kalalood. Itiraay i Paimengan no Dipon i Folalacay orasaka, o "Cenkuwangaw fodfod" hananay no Dipon a pangangan,nikawrira o " Lalood no Madawdaw" hananay no 'Amis a pangangan, nawhanni, o kakita'an no Torik a niyaro' ato kakita'an no Madawdaw niyaro' ko milengatay a mitoker to Dipong to sapipaco'ay to pilokes no tayhing no Dipong to 'Amis a finacadan. Matiya toya i 1878 miheca pilood no itiraay i Cepo' a 'Amis to Kuwaping o polong no sawali'an a 'Aimis a tamdaw a mipaco'ay to nanipapotalay a mikowanay to sapipa'adingaw to finawlan ato sapidipotaw to niyaro' ato sera. O kaloladay a 'orip no 'Amis : Do'edoen ko sowal no malitengay ato nitilidan, o na pala itini i Madawdaw o liomahan no Torik a niyaro' itiya ho sanay, i 'ayaw no 300 ko mihecaan ira ko tata'angay a cunami(langod) ma'emin a malenlen no nanom kalo pala, o maamaan to sahetoay a mafadi' cowa to ka nga'ay a kalaliomahen ko itiniay a maforaway. Toloay ko kasasiroma a kasafelaw a mafolaway a tayni o cecay i, i 'ayaw no 145 ko mihecaan ira ko lalood i Cepo' no 'Amis ato Kuwaping, namalowid to ko 'Amis a tamdaw maforaway a tayni nai Tingalaw, Cepo' ko Cikatopay, Ciwidian, Cilangasan, Ciokakay ato Sapiyat a ngasaw a tayni mipamatang. O sakatimolan no sawaliaan itini sanay ko tamtamdaw a miharateng, o saka'amisan no Falangaway 'Amis a kalala'edan. Yo kaDipongan ira ko nani 'Etolan a mafolaway a tayni, to ikor to i, mada'edo a mafolaw ko nani Torikay ato Pa'anifong a tamdaw, orasaka, o nani 'Amisay a 'Amis, nani 'Etolan ato nani Torikay ato Pa'anifongay a mafolaway a matatekoay itini mapatireng to ko sakakaay a niyaro' itini i pasawalian. O kaloladay a 'orip no 'Amis a tamdaw o maomahay, malaheci ko liomah mi'adopay, mifotingay, malaheci ko pitiposan ira ko tata'angay a ilisinan no niyaro', cowa ka matiya to roma a finacadan a milalitangal no tamdaw. o fa'inayan no 'Amis sahetoay mikadafoay mipalata'ang to parod no pikadafoan, ano manaay a mikadafo o matokaay a tamdaw sa a malikafay no cimacima. Ano mikadafo ko fa'inayan dengan o fonos ato takoyodan koni tatoyan a mikadafo, cowa ka mililam to dafong no loma'. O fafahiyan o maro'ay i loma' o mirocokay to dafong no loma'. Ano 'aloman to ko paro no laloma'an ciloma' to ko safa a fafahiyan, mitahidangan ko faki a mipakilac to dafong no laloma'an, icowaay a omah, hakowa ko papafelien a kolong, hatiraay ko 'orip no misa'Amisay a tamdaw tadarihadayay. yo tayni to ko Dipon 'afasen nangra ko sapi'adop kowang, anana: mafalic ko pinangan no 'orip sato ko 'Amis a tamdaw a matalaw. Papisakoli a misanga' to sawali'an lalan ato minato Yo tayni i sawalaian no Taywan ko Dipon a mikowan, nengneng han nangra ko 'Amis a tamdaw masinanot ko pinangan, manga'ay a ocoren lihaday a kowanaen a papisakoli, itira to a milaplap to finawlan a mipalalan, misanga' to lalan, lalan no cinamalay, mikarkar to minato. misanga' to kayakay, mlahecu ko nani Singko tahira i Kakacawan a lalan, ato tahira i Koladot a lalan.Orasaka matahidang ko i Folalacay tahira i Torik a polong 'Amis a tamdaw misakoli. Mi'afas to sapi'adop kowang ko Dipon : I 1900 miheca(Mieci 43 miheca) oya mikowanay to Taywan a Sotok no Dipon ci Sakuma Masata misatapang a midemak to "limaay mihecaan halaka to sapikowan to Yincumin), matalawen to pitoker no Yincumin, orasaka misatapang a mi'afas to kowang no Yincumin, o mamangay a kamaro'an no 'Amis a niyaro' no Posong ko pilingatoan, mi'afas to polong a sapi'adop a kowang. I Mieci(明治1911) miheca saka 3 folad, milekal ko mikowanay a Dipong to o payci ko sapi'aca to kina'orip a payso saan, miha'emin a pacici a mi'afas to sapi'adop a kowang no 'Amis, orasaka, falic sato ko mi'adopay ko ladayay 'orip no 'Amis a tamdaw, palawina sato to liomah. Toya miheca ma'eminay to ko kowang a ma'aca yosanany no Sotok-Fu sakakaay mikowanany no Dipon to Taywan, orasaka, tona mihecaan saka 6 folad satapang eca ka pafeli to nikarorayan no kakita'an a payso saan. Tona miheca saka 5 folad, tayra i Folalacay a Mipadangay-Kowan no Dipon a mililifon, onini i, o saikoray to a lifon no kakita'an saan, minokay sato alasangaliwngiw sato ko kakita'an, ma'afas ko sapi'adop a kowang, mapalasawad heca ko palifon to katayalan, cifaloco' sato ko 'alomanay laplapen ita kona Dipon nga' sato. Saka 7 foald saka 25 romi'ad saopoen no kakeridan no tayhin ci Fukuma Hitasilo ko kakita'an no kakoniyaro' tayni i Folalacay mikayki, kapoi'en ningra ko kakita'an naw ca ka laheci ko nipatorodan a palalan a tayal? mipelesay ta to ko kapoi' saka macacoli ato mipadangay kakita'an no Torik niyaro' ci Ra'olong, mitepi' laway ni Ra'olong koya tayhin, mapacikel to ko kakita'an no Torik ci Asan ato roma a kakita'an ato niocoran, taroh han to ci Fukoma tayra i papotal a mikilomot mipalo, oni to ko lalengatan no kalalood no Madawdaw. Oya tayhin namiocor heca papisanga' to lalan, ano ira ko eca ka pakalaheci ko nipatorodan a tatodong no niyah a sasanga'en a lalan, o tata'ang ko poi' no tayhin no Dipon, tepi' han no tayhin no Dipon ko mipadangay kakita'an no Torik, ira to ko kakilomot han to no 'Amis a tamdaw a mipalo ko tayhin no Dipon. Miseti' to kakita'an orasak malalood Pakatengil to ko kakita'an no Madawdaw a niyaro' ci Lekal, keriden to no kakita'an ko finawlan a mipadang, halo Torik niyaro', Paongaongan niyaro' tayra i Mipadangay-Kowan no Dipon i Folalacay a milood to kamaro'an no tayhin no Dipon, eca ka hakowa ko romi'ad maaro' to no 'Amis koya Mipadangay-Kowan a loma' no Dipon, ha'emin han to a miala ko polong a dafong no Dipon pasitira i satimolan no Kinafuki- 'alo a pahanhan. Opoh sato ko Dipon a mitahidang to i Taypakay, Yilanay,Taycongay ato Taynanay a tayhin a mipadang milood, talacowa 'aloman ko tayniay a tayhin milood, o 'Amis sa i, cowaka hakowa ko ka'aloman no tamdaw, i saka'amisan no Kinafuki- 'alo ko tayhin no Dipon, i satimolan no 'alo no Pisirian ko 'Amis a tamdaw a motoker. Safolafolad sako kalaloodan eca ka pakafilo ko tayhin no Dipong a milowid to 'Amis a tamdaw, orasaka tahidang han ko kakita'an no Falangaw ci Kolas Mahengheng a tayni ni Madawdaw papiliyo to faloco' milalang to pilood to Dipon, pasowal saan cowa ko kakari'angen no Dipon kamo saan, kalikelon to kamo nani tokos 'adihay ko sapaini no Dipon to macahiway. Hayi haw sa koya milimekay i tokas a 'Amis a tamdaw, likelon sato. Malikelon to cangra mitala ko tayhin, oya kakeridan a tamdaw lalima, ira ko kakita'an no Madawdaw ci Lekal, ira ko kakita'an no Torik ci Asan pasila'enoen ko fongoh no Dipon i teloc no mipatirengan a 'akawangay 'aol, pasemsemen ho ko pica'it ta keton han koya sapifalod a towaso a mipaseta' mipatay, ma'emin a todohen ko niyaro' no Madawdaw ato Torik, oni pakaenan a kina'orip o koko' to, o diyong to, o kolong to ma'emin a ma'afas no tayhin no Dipon. Patireng to piharatengan a 'otoc I 2008 miheca o sapiharatengaw to to'as no 'Amis, itira i ka'etip no niyaro' patirengen ko "O ci'icelay milood to Dipon a 'Amis tamdaw no Madawdaw i 1911 miheca". == Pacefaday a tilid ==
S.PHON: == ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw == itijaaj i **** miħəʦa a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u sawaɾiʡan ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un. itini i po~uso~uŋaj ko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u sakakaaj ko~unini a kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. itiraaj i paiməŋan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj o~urasaka, o~u "ʦənko~u~uwaŋaw fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ" ħananaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un a paŋaŋan,nikawrira o~u " ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw" ħananaj no~u ʡamis a paŋaŋan, nawħanni, o~u kakitaʡan no~u to~urik a nijaro~uʡ ato~u kakitaʡan no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw nijaro~uʡ ko~u miɾəŋataj a mito~ukər to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u sapipaʦo~uʡaj to~u piɾo~ukəs no~u tajħiŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. matija to~uja i **** miħəʦa piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u itiraaj i ʦəpo~uʡ a ʡamis to~u ko~u~uwapiŋ o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u sawaɾiʡan a ʡaimis a tamɬ~ɮaw a mipaʦo~uʡaj to~u nanipapo~utaɾaj a miko~uwanaj to~u sapipaʡaɬ~ɮiŋaw to~u finawɾan ato~u sapiɬ~ɮipo~utaw to~u nijaro~uʡ ato~u səra. o~u kaɾo~uɾaɬ~ɮaj a ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis : ɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u maɾitəŋaj ato~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan, o~u na paɾa itini i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw o~u ɾio~umaħan no~u to~urik a nijaro~uʡ itija ħo~u sanaj, i ʡajaw no~u *** ko~u miħəʦaan ira ko~u tataʡaŋaj a ʦo~u~unami(ɾaŋo~uɬ~ɮ) maʡəmin a maɾənɾən no~u nano~um kaɾo~u paɾa, o~u maamaan to~u saħəto~uaj a mafaɬ~ɮiʡ ʦo~uwa to~u ka ŋaʡaj a kaɾaɾio~umaħən ko~u itiniaj a mafo~urawaj. to~uɾo~uaj ko~u kasasiro~uma a kasafəɾaw a mafo~uɾawaj a tajni o~u ʦəʦaj i, i ʡajaw no~u *** ko~u miħəʦaan ira ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ no~u ʡamis ato~u ko~u~uwapiŋ, namaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw mafo~urawaj a tajni nai tiŋaɾaw, ʦəpo~uʡ ko~u ʦikato~upaj, ʦiwiɬ~ɮian, ʦiɾaŋasan, ʦio~ukakaj ato~u sapijat a ŋasaw a tajni mipamataŋ. o~u sakatimo~uɾan no~u sawaɾiaan itini sanaj ko~u tamtamɬ~ɮaw a miħaratəŋ, o~u sakaʡamisan no~u faɾaŋawaj ʡamis a kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮan. jo~u kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan ira ko~u nani ʡəto~uɾan a mafo~uɾawaj a tajni, to~u iko~ur to~u i, maɬ~ɮaʡəɬ~ɮo~u a mafo~uɾaw ko~u nani to~urikaj ato~u paʡanifo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~urasaka, o~u nani ʡamisaj a ʡamis, nani ʡəto~uɾan ato~u nani to~urikaj ato~u paʡanifo~uŋaj a mafo~uɾawaj a matatəko~uaj itini mapatirəŋ to~u ko~u sakakaaj a nijaro~uʡ itini i pasawaɾian. o~u kaɾo~uɾaɬ~ɮaj a ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u mao~umaħaj, maɾaħəʦi ko~u ɾio~umaħ miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj, mifo~utiŋaj, maɾaħəʦi ko~u pitipo~usan ira ko~u tataʡaŋaj a iɾisinan no~u nijaro~uʡ, ʦo~uwa ka matija to~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a miɾaɾitaŋaɾ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u faʡinajan no~u ʡamis saħəto~uaj mikaɬ~ɮafo~uaj mipaɾataʡaŋ to~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u pikaɬ~ɮafo~uan, ano~u manaaj a mikaɬ~ɮafo~u o~u mato~ukaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw sa a maɾikafaj no~u ʦimaʦima. ano~u mikaɬ~ɮafo~u ko~u faʡinajan ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u fo~uno~us ato~u tako~ujo~uɬ~ɮan ko~uni tato~ujan a mikaɬ~ɮafo~u, ʦo~uwa ka miɾiɾam to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ɾo~umaʡ. o~u fafaħijan o~u maro~uʡaj i ɾo~umaʡ o~u miro~uʦo~ukaj to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ɾo~umaʡ. ano~u ʡaɾo~uman to~u ko~u paro~u no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ʦiɾo~umaʡ to~u ko~u safa a fafaħijan, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋan ko~u faki a mipakiɾaʦ to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, iʦo~uwaaj a o~umaħ, ħako~uwa ko~u papafəɾiən a ko~uɾo~uŋ, ħatiraaj ko~u ʡo~urip no~u misaʡamisaj a tamɬ~ɮaw taɬ~ɮariħaɬ~ɮajaj. jo~u tajni to~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~un ʡafasən naŋra ko~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up ko~uwaŋ, anana: mafaɾiʦ ko~u pinaŋan no~u ʡo~urip sato~u ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw a mataɾaw. papisako~uɾi a misaŋaʡ to~u sawaɾiʡan ɾaɾan ato~u minato~u jo~u tajni i sawaɾaian no~u tajwan ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~un a miko~uwan, nəŋnəŋ ħan naŋra ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw masinano~ut ko~u pinaŋan, maŋaʡaj a o~uʦo~urən ɾiħaɬ~ɮaj a ko~uwanaən a papisako~uɾi, itira to~u a miɾapɾap to~u finawɾan a mipaɾaɾan, misaŋaʡ to~u ɾaɾan, ɾaɾan no~u ʦinamaɾaj, mikarkar to~u minato~u. misaŋaʡ to~u kajakaj, mɾaħəʦo~u~u ko~u nani siŋko~u taħira i kakaʦawan a ɾaɾan, ato~u taħira i ko~uɾaɬ~ɮo~ut a ɾaɾan.o~urasaka mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ ko~u i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj taħira i to~urik a po~uɾo~uŋ ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw misako~uɾi. miʡafas to~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up ko~uwaŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~un : i **** miħəʦa(miəʦi ** miħəʦa) o~uja miko~uwanaj to~u tajwan a so~uto~uk no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un ʦi sako~u~uma masata misatapaŋ a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u "ɾimaaj miħəʦaan ħaɾaka to~u sapiko~uwan to~u jinʦo~u~umin), mataɾawən to~u pito~ukər no~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~urasaka misatapaŋ a miʡafas to~u ko~uwaŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u mamaŋaj a kamaro~uʡan no~u ʡamis a nijaro~uʡ no~u po~uso~uŋ ko~u piɾiŋato~uan, miʡafas to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up a ko~uwaŋ. i miəʦi(******) miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, miɾəkaɾ ko~u miko~uwanaj a ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u o~u pajʦi ko~u sapiʡaʦa to~u kinaʡo~urip a pajso~u saan, miħaʡəmin a paʦiʦi a miʡafas to~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up a ko~uwaŋ no~u ʡamis, o~urasaka, faɾiʦ sato~u ko~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj ko~u ɾaɬ~ɮajaj ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, paɾawina sato~u to~u ɾio~umaħ. to~uja miħəʦa maʡəminaj to~u ko~u ko~uwaŋ a maʡaʦa jo~usananj no~u so~uto~uk-fo~u~u sakakaaj miko~uwananj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un to~u tajwan, o~urasaka, to~una miħəʦaan saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ satapaŋ əʦa ka pafəɾi to~u nikaro~urajan no~u kakitaʡan a pajso~u saan. to~una miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, tajra i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj a mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj-ko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un a miɾiɾifo~un, o~unini i, o~u saiko~uraj to~u a ɾifo~un no~u kakitaʡan saan, mino~ukaj sato~u aɾasaŋaɾiwŋiw sato~u ko~u kakitaʡan, maʡafas ko~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up a ko~uwaŋ, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ħəʦa ko~u paɾifo~un to~u katajaɾan, ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ sato~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ɾapɾapən ita ko~una ɬ~ɮipo~un ŋaʡ sato~u. saka * fo~uaɾɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ sao~upo~uən no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u tajħin ʦi fo~u~uko~u~uma ħitasiɾo~u ko~u kakitaʡan no~u kako~unijaro~uʡ tajni i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj mikajki, kapo~uiʡən niŋra ko~u kakitaʡan naw ʦa ka ɾaħəʦi ko~u nipato~uro~uɬ~ɮan a paɾaɾan a tajaɾ? mipəɾəsaj ta to~u ko~u kapo~uiʡ saka maʦaʦo~uɾi ato~u mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj kakitaʡan no~u to~urik nijaro~uʡ ʦi raʡo~uɾo~uŋ, mitəpiʡ ɾawaj ni raʡo~uɾo~uŋ ko~uja tajħin, mapaʦikəɾ to~u ko~u kakitaʡan no~u to~urik ʦi asan ato~u ro~uma a kakitaʡan ato~u nio~uʦo~uran, taro~uħ ħan to~u ʦi fo~u~uko~uma tajra i papo~utaɾ a mikiɾo~umo~ut mipaɾo~u, o~uni to~u ko~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw. o~uja tajħin namio~uʦo~ur ħəʦa papisaŋaʡ to~u ɾaɾan, ano~u ira ko~u əʦa ka pakaɾaħəʦi ko~u nipato~uro~uɬ~ɮan a tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u nijaħ a sasaŋaʡən a ɾaɾan, o~u tataʡaŋ ko~u po~uiʡ no~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, təpiʡ ħan no~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un ko~u mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj kakitaʡan no~u to~urik, ira to~u ko~u kakiɾo~umo~ut ħan to~u no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw a mipaɾo~u ko~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un. misətiʡ to~u kakitaʡan o~urasak maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ pakatəŋiɾ to~u ko~u kakitaʡan no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw a nijaro~uʡ ʦi ɾəkaɾ, kəriɬ~ɮən to~u no~u kakitaʡan ko~u finawɾan a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ, ħaɾo~u to~urik nijaro~uʡ, pao~uŋao~uŋan nijaro~uʡ tajra i mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj-ko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kamaro~uʡan no~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, əʦa ka ħako~uwa ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maaro~uʡ to~u no~u ʡamis ko~uja mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj-ko~uwan a ɾo~umaʡ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, ħaʡəmin ħan to~u a miaɾa ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un pasitira i satimo~uɾan no~u kinafo~u~uki- ʡaɾo~u a paħanħan. o~upo~uħ sato~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~un a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u i tajpakaj, jiɾanaj,tajʦo~uŋaj ato~u tajnanaj a tajħin a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, taɾaʦo~uwa ʡaɾo~uman ko~u tajniaj a tajħin miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~u ʡamis sa i, ʦo~uwaka ħako~uwa ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, i sakaʡamisan no~u kinafo~u~uki- ʡaɾo~u ko~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, i satimo~uɾan no~u ʡaɾo~u no~u pisirian ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw a mo~uto~ukər. safo~uɾafo~uɾaɬ~ɮ sako~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan əʦa ka pakafiɾo~u ko~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~urasaka taħiɬ~ɮaŋ ħan ko~u kakitaʡan no~u faɾaŋaw ʦi ko~uɾas maħəŋħəŋ a tajni ni maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw papiɾijo~u to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ miɾaɾaŋ to~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, paso~uwaɾ saan ʦo~uwa ko~u kakariʡaŋən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un kamo~u saan, kaɾikəɾo~un to~u kamo~u nani to~uko~us ʡaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u sapaini no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un to~u maʦaħiwaj. ħaji ħaw sa ko~uja miɾiməkaj i to~ukas a ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, ɾikəɾo~un sato~u. maɾikəɾo~un to~u ʦaŋra mitaɾa ko~u tajħin, o~uja kakəriɬ~ɮan a tamɬ~ɮaw ɾaɾima, ira ko~u kakitaʡan no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ʦi ɾəkaɾ, ira ko~u kakitaʡan no~u to~urik ʦi asan pasiɾaʡəno~uən ko~u fo~uŋo~uħ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un i təɾo~uʦ no~u mipatirəŋan a ʡakawaŋaj ʡao~uɾ, pasəmsəmən ħo~u ko~u piʦaʡit ta kəto~un ħan ko~uja sapifaɾo~uɬ~ɮ a to~uwaso~u a mipasətaʡ mipataj, maʡəmin a to~uɬ~ɮo~uħən ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ato~u to~urik, o~uni pakaənan a kinaʡo~urip o~u ko~uko~uʡ to~u, o~u ɬ~ɮijo~uŋ to~u, o~u ko~uɾo~uŋ to~u maʡəmin a maʡafas no~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un. patirəŋ to~u piħaratəŋan a ʡo~uto~uʦ i **** miħəʦa o~u sapiħaratəŋaw to~u to~uʡas no~u ʡamis, itira i kaʡətip no~u nijaro~uʡ patirəŋən ko~u "o~u ʦiʡiʦəɾaj miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~un a ʡamis tamɬ~ɮaw no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw i **** miħəʦa". == paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ==
S.FORM: == Lalood no Madawdaw == Itiyaay i 1911 miheca a lalood no Sawali'an 'Amis a tamdaw ato tayhin no Dipon. itini i Posongay kowan no Dipong o sakakaay konini a kalalood. Itiraay i Paimengan no Dipon i Folalacay orasaka, o "Cenkuwangaw fodfod" hananay no Dipon a pangangan,nikawrira o " Lalood no Madawdaw" hananay no 'Amis a pangangan, nawhanni, o kakita'an no Torik a niyaro' ato kakita'an no Madawdaw niyaro' ko milengatay a mitoker to Dipong to sapipaco'ay to pilokes no tayhing no Dipong to 'Amis a finacadan. Matiya toya i 1878 miheca pilood no itiraay i Cepo' a 'Amis to Kuwaping o polong no sawali'an a 'Aimis a tamdaw a mipaco'ay to nanipapotalay a mikowanay to sapipa'adingaw to finawlan ato sapidipotaw to niyaro' ato sera. O kaloladay a 'orip no 'Amis : Do'edoen ko sowal no malitengay ato nitilidan, o na pala itini i Madawdaw o liomahan no Torik a niyaro' itiya ho sanay, i 'ayaw no 300 ko mihecaan ira ko tata'angay a cunami(langod) ma'emin a malenlen no nanom kalo pala, o maamaan to sahetoay a mafadi' cowa to ka nga'ay a kalaliomahen ko itiniay a maforaway. Toloay ko kasasiroma a kasafelaw a mafolaway a tayni o cecay i, i 'ayaw no 145 ko mihecaan ira ko lalood i Cepo' no 'Amis ato Kuwaping, namalowid to ko 'Amis a tamdaw maforaway a tayni nai Tingalaw, Cepo' ko Cikatopay, Ciwidian, Cilangasan, Ciokakay ato Sapiyat a ngasaw a tayni mipamatang. O sakatimolan no sawaliaan itini sanay ko tamtamdaw a miharateng, o saka'amisan no Falangaway 'Amis a kalala'edan. Yo kaDipongan ira ko nani 'Etolan a mafolaway a tayni, to ikor to i, mada'edo a mafolaw ko nani Torikay ato Pa'anifong a tamdaw, orasaka, o nani 'Amisay a 'Amis, nani 'Etolan ato nani Torikay ato Pa'anifongay a mafolaway a matatekoay itini mapatireng to ko sakakaay a niyaro' itini i pasawalian. O kaloladay a 'orip no 'Amis a tamdaw o maomahay, malaheci ko liomah mi'adopay, mifotingay, malaheci ko pitiposan ira ko tata'angay a ilisinan no niyaro', cowa ka matiya to roma a finacadan a milalitangal no tamdaw. o fa'inayan no 'Amis sahetoay mikadafoay mipalata'ang to parod no pikadafoan, ano manaay a mikadafo o matokaay a tamdaw sa a malikafay no cimacima. Ano mikadafo ko fa'inayan dengan o fonos ato takoyodan koni tatoyan a mikadafo, cowa ka mililam to dafong no loma'. O fafahiyan o maro'ay i loma' o mirocokay to dafong no loma'. Ano 'aloman to ko paro no laloma'an ciloma' to ko safa a fafahiyan, mitahidangan ko faki a mipakilac to dafong no laloma'an, icowaay a omah, hakowa ko papafelien a kolong, hatiraay ko 'orip no misa'Amisay a tamdaw tadarihadayay. yo tayni to ko Dipon 'afasen nangra ko sapi'adop kowang, anana: mafalic ko pinangan no 'orip sato ko 'Amis a tamdaw a matalaw. Papisakoli a misanga' to sawali'an lalan ato minato Yo tayni i sawalaian no Taywan ko Dipon a mikowan, nengneng han nangra ko 'Amis a tamdaw masinanot ko pinangan, manga'ay a ocoren lihaday a kowanaen a papisakoli, itira to a milaplap to finawlan a mipalalan, misanga' to lalan, lalan no cinamalay, mikarkar to minato. misanga' to kayakay, mlahecu ko nani Singko tahira i Kakacawan a lalan, ato tahira i Koladot a lalan.Orasaka matahidang ko i Folalacay tahira i Torik a polong 'Amis a tamdaw misakoli. Mi'afas to sapi'adop kowang ko Dipon : I 1900 miheca(Mieci 43 miheca) oya mikowanay to Taywan a Sotok no Dipon ci Sakuma Masata misatapang a midemak to "limaay mihecaan halaka to sapikowan to Yincumin), matalawen to pitoker no Yincumin, orasaka misatapang a mi'afas to kowang no Yincumin, o mamangay a kamaro'an no 'Amis a niyaro' no Posong ko pilingatoan, mi'afas to polong a sapi'adop a kowang. I Mieci(明治1911) miheca saka 3 folad, milekal ko mikowanay a Dipong to o payci ko sapi'aca to kina'orip a payso saan, miha'emin a pacici a mi'afas to sapi'adop a kowang no 'Amis, orasaka, falic sato ko mi'adopay ko ladayay 'orip no 'Amis a tamdaw, palawina sato to liomah. Toya miheca ma'eminay to ko kowang a ma'aca yosanany no Sotok-Fu sakakaay mikowanany no Dipon to Taywan, orasaka, tona mihecaan saka 6 folad satapang eca ka pafeli to nikarorayan no kakita'an a payso saan. Tona miheca saka 5 folad, tayra i Folalacay a Mipadangay-Kowan no Dipon a mililifon, onini i, o saikoray to a lifon no kakita'an saan, minokay sato alasangaliwngiw sato ko kakita'an, ma'afas ko sapi'adop a kowang, mapalasawad heca ko palifon to katayalan, cifaloco' sato ko 'alomanay laplapen ita kona Dipon nga' sato. Saka 7 foald saka 25 romi'ad saopoen no kakeridan no tayhin ci Fukuma Hitasilo ko kakita'an no kakoniyaro' tayni i Folalacay mikayki, kapoi'en ningra ko kakita'an naw ca ka laheci ko nipatorodan a palalan a tayal? mipelesay ta to ko kapoi' saka macacoli ato mipadangay kakita'an no Torik niyaro' ci Ra'olong, mitepi' laway ni Ra'olong koya tayhin, mapacikel to ko kakita'an no Torik ci Asan ato roma a kakita'an ato niocoran, taroh han to ci Fukoma tayra i papotal a mikilomot mipalo, oni to ko lalengatan no kalalood no Madawdaw. Oya tayhin namiocor heca papisanga' to lalan, ano ira ko eca ka pakalaheci ko nipatorodan a tatodong no niyah a sasanga'en a lalan, o tata'ang ko poi' no tayhin no Dipon, tepi' han no tayhin no Dipon ko mipadangay kakita'an no Torik, ira to ko kakilomot han to no 'Amis a tamdaw a mipalo ko tayhin no Dipon. Miseti' to kakita'an orasak malalood Pakatengil to ko kakita'an no Madawdaw a niyaro' ci Lekal, keriden to no kakita'an ko finawlan a mipadang, halo Torik niyaro', Paongaongan niyaro' tayra i Mipadangay-Kowan no Dipon i Folalacay a milood to kamaro'an no tayhin no Dipon, eca ka hakowa ko romi'ad maaro' to no 'Amis koya Mipadangay-Kowan a loma' no Dipon, ha'emin han to a miala ko polong a dafong no Dipon pasitira i satimolan no Kinafuki- 'alo a pahanhan. Opoh sato ko Dipon a mitahidang to i Taypakay, Yilanay,Taycongay ato Taynanay a tayhin a mipadang milood, talacowa 'aloman ko tayniay a tayhin milood, o 'Amis sa i, cowaka hakowa ko ka'aloman no tamdaw, i saka'amisan no Kinafuki- 'alo ko tayhin no Dipon, i satimolan no 'alo no Pisirian ko 'Amis a tamdaw a motoker. Safolafolad sako kalaloodan eca ka pakafilo ko tayhin no Dipong a milowid to 'Amis a tamdaw, orasaka tahidang han ko kakita'an no Falangaw ci Kolas Mahengheng a tayni ni Madawdaw papiliyo to faloco' milalang to pilood to Dipon, pasowal saan cowa ko kakari'angen no Dipon kamo saan, kalikelon to kamo nani tokos 'adihay ko sapaini no Dipon to macahiway. Hayi haw sa koya milimekay i tokas a 'Amis a tamdaw, likelon sato. Malikelon to cangra mitala ko tayhin, oya kakeridan a tamdaw lalima, ira ko kakita'an no Madawdaw ci Lekal, ira ko kakita'an no Torik ci Asan pasila'enoen ko fongoh no Dipon i teloc no mipatirengan a 'akawangay 'aol, pasemsemen ho ko pica'it ta keton han koya sapifalod a towaso a mipaseta' mipatay, ma'emin a todohen ko niyaro' no Madawdaw ato Torik, oni pakaenan a kina'orip o koko' to, o diyong to, o kolong to ma'emin a ma'afas no tayhin no Dipon. Patireng to piharatengan a 'otoc I 2008 miheca o sapiharatengaw to to'as no 'Amis, itira i ka'etip no niyaro' patirengen ko "O ci'icelay milood to Dipon a 'Amis tamdaw no Madawdaw i 1911 miheca". == Pacefaday a tilid ==
S.PHON: == ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw == itijaaj i **** miħəʦa a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u sawaɾiʡan ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un. itini i po~uso~uŋaj ko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u sakakaaj ko~unini a kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. itiraaj i paiməŋan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj o~urasaka, o~u "ʦənko~u~uwaŋaw fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ" ħananaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un a paŋaŋan,nikawrira o~u " ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw" ħananaj no~u ʡamis a paŋaŋan, nawħanni, o~u kakitaʡan no~u to~urik a nijaro~uʡ ato~u kakitaʡan no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw nijaro~uʡ ko~u miɾəŋataj a mito~ukər to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u sapipaʦo~uʡaj to~u piɾo~ukəs no~u tajħiŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. matija to~uja i **** miħəʦa piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u itiraaj i ʦəpo~uʡ a ʡamis to~u ko~u~uwapiŋ o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u sawaɾiʡan a ʡaimis a tamɬ~ɮaw a mipaʦo~uʡaj to~u nanipapo~utaɾaj a miko~uwanaj to~u sapipaʡaɬ~ɮiŋaw to~u finawɾan ato~u sapiɬ~ɮipo~utaw to~u nijaro~uʡ ato~u səra. o~u kaɾo~uɾaɬ~ɮaj a ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis : ɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u maɾitəŋaj ato~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan, o~u na paɾa itini i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw o~u ɾio~umaħan no~u to~urik a nijaro~uʡ itija ħo~u sanaj, i ʡajaw no~u *** ko~u miħəʦaan ira ko~u tataʡaŋaj a ʦo~u~unami(ɾaŋo~uɬ~ɮ) maʡəmin a maɾənɾən no~u nano~um kaɾo~u paɾa, o~u maamaan to~u saħəto~uaj a mafaɬ~ɮiʡ ʦo~uwa to~u ka ŋaʡaj a kaɾaɾio~umaħən ko~u itiniaj a mafo~urawaj. to~uɾo~uaj ko~u kasasiro~uma a kasafəɾaw a mafo~uɾawaj a tajni o~u ʦəʦaj i, i ʡajaw no~u *** ko~u miħəʦaan ira ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ no~u ʡamis ato~u ko~u~uwapiŋ, namaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw mafo~urawaj a tajni nai tiŋaɾaw, ʦəpo~uʡ ko~u ʦikato~upaj, ʦiwiɬ~ɮian, ʦiɾaŋasan, ʦio~ukakaj ato~u sapijat a ŋasaw a tajni mipamataŋ. o~u sakatimo~uɾan no~u sawaɾiaan itini sanaj ko~u tamtamɬ~ɮaw a miħaratəŋ, o~u sakaʡamisan no~u faɾaŋawaj ʡamis a kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮan. jo~u kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan ira ko~u nani ʡəto~uɾan a mafo~uɾawaj a tajni, to~u iko~ur to~u i, maɬ~ɮaʡəɬ~ɮo~u a mafo~uɾaw ko~u nani to~urikaj ato~u paʡanifo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~urasaka, o~u nani ʡamisaj a ʡamis, nani ʡəto~uɾan ato~u nani to~urikaj ato~u paʡanifo~uŋaj a mafo~uɾawaj a matatəko~uaj itini mapatirəŋ to~u ko~u sakakaaj a nijaro~uʡ itini i pasawaɾian. o~u kaɾo~uɾaɬ~ɮaj a ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u mao~umaħaj, maɾaħəʦi ko~u ɾio~umaħ miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj, mifo~utiŋaj, maɾaħəʦi ko~u pitipo~usan ira ko~u tataʡaŋaj a iɾisinan no~u nijaro~uʡ, ʦo~uwa ka matija to~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a miɾaɾitaŋaɾ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u faʡinajan no~u ʡamis saħəto~uaj mikaɬ~ɮafo~uaj mipaɾataʡaŋ to~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u pikaɬ~ɮafo~uan, ano~u manaaj a mikaɬ~ɮafo~u o~u mato~ukaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw sa a maɾikafaj no~u ʦimaʦima. ano~u mikaɬ~ɮafo~u ko~u faʡinajan ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u fo~uno~us ato~u tako~ujo~uɬ~ɮan ko~uni tato~ujan a mikaɬ~ɮafo~u, ʦo~uwa ka miɾiɾam to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ɾo~umaʡ. o~u fafaħijan o~u maro~uʡaj i ɾo~umaʡ o~u miro~uʦo~ukaj to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ɾo~umaʡ. ano~u ʡaɾo~uman to~u ko~u paro~u no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ʦiɾo~umaʡ to~u ko~u safa a fafaħijan, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋan ko~u faki a mipakiɾaʦ to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, iʦo~uwaaj a o~umaħ, ħako~uwa ko~u papafəɾiən a ko~uɾo~uŋ, ħatiraaj ko~u ʡo~urip no~u misaʡamisaj a tamɬ~ɮaw taɬ~ɮariħaɬ~ɮajaj. jo~u tajni to~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~un ʡafasən naŋra ko~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up ko~uwaŋ, anana: mafaɾiʦ ko~u pinaŋan no~u ʡo~urip sato~u ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw a mataɾaw. papisako~uɾi a misaŋaʡ to~u sawaɾiʡan ɾaɾan ato~u minato~u jo~u tajni i sawaɾaian no~u tajwan ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~un a miko~uwan, nəŋnəŋ ħan naŋra ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw masinano~ut ko~u pinaŋan, maŋaʡaj a o~uʦo~urən ɾiħaɬ~ɮaj a ko~uwanaən a papisako~uɾi, itira to~u a miɾapɾap to~u finawɾan a mipaɾaɾan, misaŋaʡ to~u ɾaɾan, ɾaɾan no~u ʦinamaɾaj, mikarkar to~u minato~u. misaŋaʡ to~u kajakaj, mɾaħəʦo~u~u ko~u nani siŋko~u taħira i kakaʦawan a ɾaɾan, ato~u taħira i ko~uɾaɬ~ɮo~ut a ɾaɾan.o~urasaka mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ ko~u i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj taħira i to~urik a po~uɾo~uŋ ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw misako~uɾi. miʡafas to~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up ko~uwaŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~un : i **** miħəʦa(miəʦi ** miħəʦa) o~uja miko~uwanaj to~u tajwan a so~uto~uk no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un ʦi sako~u~uma masata misatapaŋ a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u "ɾimaaj miħəʦaan ħaɾaka to~u sapiko~uwan to~u jinʦo~u~umin), mataɾawən to~u pito~ukər no~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~urasaka misatapaŋ a miʡafas to~u ko~uwaŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u mamaŋaj a kamaro~uʡan no~u ʡamis a nijaro~uʡ no~u po~uso~uŋ ko~u piɾiŋato~uan, miʡafas to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up a ko~uwaŋ. i miəʦi(******) miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, miɾəkaɾ ko~u miko~uwanaj a ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u o~u pajʦi ko~u sapiʡaʦa to~u kinaʡo~urip a pajso~u saan, miħaʡəmin a paʦiʦi a miʡafas to~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up a ko~uwaŋ no~u ʡamis, o~urasaka, faɾiʦ sato~u ko~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj ko~u ɾaɬ~ɮajaj ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, paɾawina sato~u to~u ɾio~umaħ. to~uja miħəʦa maʡəminaj to~u ko~u ko~uwaŋ a maʡaʦa jo~usananj no~u so~uto~uk-fo~u~u sakakaaj miko~uwananj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un to~u tajwan, o~urasaka, to~una miħəʦaan saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ satapaŋ əʦa ka pafəɾi to~u nikaro~urajan no~u kakitaʡan a pajso~u saan. to~una miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, tajra i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj a mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj-ko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un a miɾiɾifo~un, o~unini i, o~u saiko~uraj to~u a ɾifo~un no~u kakitaʡan saan, mino~ukaj sato~u aɾasaŋaɾiwŋiw sato~u ko~u kakitaʡan, maʡafas ko~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up a ko~uwaŋ, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ħəʦa ko~u paɾifo~un to~u katajaɾan, ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ sato~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ɾapɾapən ita ko~una ɬ~ɮipo~un ŋaʡ sato~u. saka * fo~uaɾɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ sao~upo~uən no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u tajħin ʦi fo~u~uko~u~uma ħitasiɾo~u ko~u kakitaʡan no~u kako~unijaro~uʡ tajni i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj mikajki, kapo~uiʡən niŋra ko~u kakitaʡan naw ʦa ka ɾaħəʦi ko~u nipato~uro~uɬ~ɮan a paɾaɾan a tajaɾ? mipəɾəsaj ta to~u ko~u kapo~uiʡ saka maʦaʦo~uɾi ato~u mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj kakitaʡan no~u to~urik nijaro~uʡ ʦi raʡo~uɾo~uŋ, mitəpiʡ ɾawaj ni raʡo~uɾo~uŋ ko~uja tajħin, mapaʦikəɾ to~u ko~u kakitaʡan no~u to~urik ʦi asan ato~u ro~uma a kakitaʡan ato~u nio~uʦo~uran, taro~uħ ħan to~u ʦi fo~u~uko~uma tajra i papo~utaɾ a mikiɾo~umo~ut mipaɾo~u, o~uni to~u ko~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw. o~uja tajħin namio~uʦo~ur ħəʦa papisaŋaʡ to~u ɾaɾan, ano~u ira ko~u əʦa ka pakaɾaħəʦi ko~u nipato~uro~uɬ~ɮan a tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u nijaħ a sasaŋaʡən a ɾaɾan, o~u tataʡaŋ ko~u po~uiʡ no~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, təpiʡ ħan no~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un ko~u mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj kakitaʡan no~u to~urik, ira to~u ko~u kakiɾo~umo~ut ħan to~u no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw a mipaɾo~u ko~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un. misətiʡ to~u kakitaʡan o~urasak maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ pakatəŋiɾ to~u ko~u kakitaʡan no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw a nijaro~uʡ ʦi ɾəkaɾ, kəriɬ~ɮən to~u no~u kakitaʡan ko~u finawɾan a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ, ħaɾo~u to~urik nijaro~uʡ, pao~uŋao~uŋan nijaro~uʡ tajra i mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj-ko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kamaro~uʡan no~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, əʦa ka ħako~uwa ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maaro~uʡ to~u no~u ʡamis ko~uja mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj-ko~uwan a ɾo~umaʡ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, ħaʡəmin ħan to~u a miaɾa ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un pasitira i satimo~uɾan no~u kinafo~u~uki- ʡaɾo~u a paħanħan. o~upo~uħ sato~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~un a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u i tajpakaj, jiɾanaj,tajʦo~uŋaj ato~u tajnanaj a tajħin a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, taɾaʦo~uwa ʡaɾo~uman ko~u tajniaj a tajħin miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~u ʡamis sa i, ʦo~uwaka ħako~uwa ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, i sakaʡamisan no~u kinafo~u~uki- ʡaɾo~u ko~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, i satimo~uɾan no~u ʡaɾo~u no~u pisirian ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw a mo~uto~ukər. safo~uɾafo~uɾaɬ~ɮ sako~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan əʦa ka pakafiɾo~u ko~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~urasaka taħiɬ~ɮaŋ ħan ko~u kakitaʡan no~u faɾaŋaw ʦi ko~uɾas maħəŋħəŋ a tajni ni maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw papiɾijo~u to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ miɾaɾaŋ to~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, paso~uwaɾ saan ʦo~uwa ko~u kakariʡaŋən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un kamo~u saan, kaɾikəɾo~un to~u kamo~u nani to~uko~us ʡaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u sapaini no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un to~u maʦaħiwaj. ħaji ħaw sa ko~uja miɾiməkaj i to~ukas a ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, ɾikəɾo~un sato~u. maɾikəɾo~un to~u ʦaŋra mitaɾa ko~u tajħin, o~uja kakəriɬ~ɮan a tamɬ~ɮaw ɾaɾima, ira ko~u kakitaʡan no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ʦi ɾəkaɾ, ira ko~u kakitaʡan no~u to~urik ʦi asan pasiɾaʡəno~uən ko~u fo~uŋo~uħ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un i təɾo~uʦ no~u mipatirəŋan a ʡakawaŋaj ʡao~uɾ, pasəmsəmən ħo~u ko~u piʦaʡit ta kəto~un ħan ko~uja sapifaɾo~uɬ~ɮ a to~uwaso~u a mipasətaʡ mipataj, maʡəmin a to~uɬ~ɮo~uħən ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ato~u to~urik, o~uni pakaənan a kinaʡo~urip o~u ko~uko~uʡ to~u, o~u ɬ~ɮijo~uŋ to~u, o~u ko~uɾo~uŋ to~u maʡəmin a maʡafas no~u tajħin no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un. patirəŋ to~u piħaratəŋan a ʡo~uto~uʦ i **** miħəʦa o~u sapiħaratəŋaw to~u to~uʡas no~u ʡamis, itira i kaʡətip no~u nijaro~uʡ patirəŋən ko~u "o~u ʦiʡiʦəɾaj miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~un a ʡamis tamɬ~ɮaw no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw i **** miħəʦa". == paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ==
